name: Fang

skills.name: Going Undercover
skills.description: Periodically reveals a random enemy hero within range.Attacks on monsters deal extra true damage.

skills.name: Target Sighted
skills.description: Marks the target enemy while gaining attack speed and range. Attacks on marked targets stack more marks, increasing mark damage. When marks expire or reach max stacks, they explode, dealing area damage.

skills.name: Wheel Away
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction, slowing and dealing damage to enemies in his path. He is untargetable while dashing. Scorches the ground along the way, slowing and dealing damage to enemies in range.

skills.name: Bladestorm
skills.description: Throws his blade to the target location,dealing damage over time and slowing enemies wihin range.

tips: Fang is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 50.4% win rate and 1.0% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Eternity Blade → Boots of Dexterity → Shadow Ripper → Axe of Torment → Master Sword.
Run Mutation for stats that match Fang's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Target Sighted → Wheel Away → Bladestorm → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
Teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
Fang excels into Mai Shiranui, Nakoruru, Zilong. Avoid blind picking into Dun without team peel.

Fang is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 50.4% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.0% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Fang.

faqs.question: Is Fang good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Fang is Tier A Marksman with 50.4% win rate, 1.0% pick rate, and 0.0% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Solid situational pick.

faqs.question: What is the best Fang build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Eternity Blade, Boots of Dexterity, siege breaker, Shadow Ripper, Axe of Torment, Master Sword. Run Mutation arcana with Haste & Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Fang?
faqs.answer: Pick Dun into Fang. Deny Farm Lane resources early and force fights before Fang completes core items. Fang struggles when the enemy can dive and burst them.

faqs.question: Who does Fang counter?
faqs.answer: Fang is strong into Mai Shiranui, Nakoruru, Zilong according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Fang when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Farm Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Fang good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Fang is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 50.4% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.0% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Fang.

faqs.question: What lane should Fang play?
faqs.answer: Fang is tagged Farm Lane in Camp export (Marksman). Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Fang?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Mutation arcana. Battle spell: Haste & Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Fang or Hou Yi — which is better?
faqs.answer: Fang vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Fang has +1.1% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Fang when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Fang?
faqs.answer: Optional ban when enemy spams Marksman; 1.0% pick rate but only 0.0% ban rate.
